$comment: scripts/CeruleanGym.asm CeruleanGymMistyText — challenge -> OPP_MISTY -> CASCADEBADGE + BEAT_MISTY + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM11 (no separate 'take this' beat — the badge lecture hands it straight over). A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
TM11 teaches
BUBBLEBEAM! Use it on an
aquatic POKéMON!

else.text:
Hi, you're a new
face! Trainers who want
to turn pro have
to have a policy
about POKéMON! What is your
approach when you
catch POKéMON? My policy is an
all-out offensive
with water-type
POKéMON!

then.text:
Wow!
You're too much! All right! You can have the
CASCADEBADGE to
show you beat me!

The CASCADEBADGE
makes all POKéMON
up to L30 obey! That includes
even outsiders! There's more, you
can now use CUT
any time! You can CUT down
small bushes to
open new paths! You can also have
my favorite TM!

TM11 teaches
BUBBLEBEAM! Use it on an
aquatic POKéMON!
